title: Evaluate the Testing Trophy vs. Pyramid
description: Evaluate the trade-offs between the Testing Trophy and Testing Pyramid models for modern distributed systems. Prioritize testing efforts across unit, integration, and E2E layers to achieve maximum production confidence.
objectives: Evaluate the trade-offs between the Testing Trophy and Testing Pyramid models for modern distributed systems.
Prioritize testing efforts across unit, integration, and E2E layers to achieve maximum production confidence.
